Description: Shows the sign-in name of the user who last edited the record.
Shows the date and time of the last change. The time is output in the local time of the user in accordance with the set time zone.
Shows the sign-in name of the user who created the record.
Shows date and time when the record was created. The time is output in the local time of the user in accordance with the set time zone.
Shows date and time when the record was created. The time is output in the Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).
Shows the date and time of the last change. The time is output in the Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).
